title: MTR France Addon
description:
EN: This mod is especially designed to be an addon for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, adding french railway content.

FR: Ce mod spécialement prévu comme addon pour le mod Minecraft Transit Railway, ajoutant du contenu ferroviaire français.
body:
## MTR France Addon

[![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_64h.png)](https://github.com/MTR-France-Team/MTR-France-Addon)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/project/YJct9p8I)

![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/supported/fabric_46h.png)
![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/supported/forge_46h.png)

✅ 1.2.0(-hotfix2) -> We are compatible with **MTR 4.0.3** !

⚠️ 1.2.0(-hotfix2) -> Large file ! Not realy optimized ! (but still playable)

**Information before downloading**
 - Both MTR and the MTR France Addon require the Fabric API with the fabric loader
 - Check your Minecraft and MTR versions:
    - MTR does not support any version before 1.16.5 or after 1.20.4.
    - The MTR France Addon is only compatible with MTR 4.0.0 and above (not with MTR 3.0.0 and earlier).

## **What is the MTR France Addon?**
The MTR France Addon adds French trains, P.I.D.S., logo, cable cars, new rail limitation, and signs to your game ! 

<details>
<summary>Added trains</summary>
  
- TGV [PSE/Postal](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-tgv-pse)/[Duplex](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-tgv-duplex)/[Atlantique/THALYS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-tgv-atlantique-thalys)
- MI *79 (retexture of M-train)*/*84 (retexture of M-train)*/*84*
- MF *67*/*77*
- MP *14*/*59*
- Corail train: *BB22200* + *Corail cars* + *B6*
- *Z 20500*
- Citadis Dualis IDFM (S43)
- Caf
- Renault Agora
- Les Gets

</details>

<details>
<summary>Added assets</summary>
  
- Ticket machines
- Ticket barriers
- Seats
- PIDS
- Logos
- Platforms
- *[MTR Sign Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-sign-addon)*\*

* MTR Sign Addon add many inspired French Sign. It is optimized and updated ONLY in the mod !

</details>

<details>
<summary>Other</summary>
  
We also add the folowing:
- 70 to 320 km/h rails (in odd number)
- 999 km/h troll rails (Shoud be remove in a future update)

</details>

## **PIDS ROUTES**

To configure your trains, go to the "Railway Dashboard" → "Routes" tab and edit a route by clicking on the pencil icon next to it. The important field is "Route Number".

<details>
<summary>"Route Number" Formats for SNCF PIDS</summary>

The Route Number field accepts several formats:

1. **Standard Format**:\
  `<Train_Type>|<Train_Number>`
2. **Transilien Format**:\
  `<Train_Type>|<Train_Number>|<Transilien_Line>`
3. **Auto-Increment Format (Beta)**:\
  Use % to indicate digits that should increment.
    - Example: TGV|78%% will generate trains 7800, 7801, 7802...
    - Example: TER|8%%% will generate trains 8000, 8001, 8002...
    - Example : TRANSILIEN|132%%%|L will generate trains 132000, 132001... with line name: L

</details>

<details>
<summary>List of Train Types and Aliases for SNCF PIDS</summary>

- SNCF
- TGV
- INOUI (TGVINOUI, TGV INOUI)
- OUIGO (TGVOUIGO, TGV OUIGO)
- LYRIA (TGVLYRIA, TGV LYRIA)
- FRECCIAROSSA (TGVFRECCIAROSSA, TGV FRECCIAROSSA)
- TRENITALIA (TGVTRENITALIA, TGV TRENITALIA)
- THALYS (TGVTHALYS, TGV THALYS)
- RENFE (TGVRENFE, TGV RENFE)
- EUROSTAR (TGVEUROSTAR, TGV EUROSTAR)
- INTERCITIES (IC, INTERCITY, INTERCITÉS, INTERCITÉ)
- TER
- RER
- TRANSILIEN
- IDTGV (ID TGV)
- LER
- CAR (AUTOCAR, BUS, BUS SNCF, CAR SNCF)


If an unknown type is used, **SNCF** will be the default.

</details>

<details>
<summary>"Route Number" Formats for SIEL and IDF PIDS</summary>
  
The codes may be in uppercase and must be the last number in the route name.


Ex: `Metro 1||East Dir. 1`\
-> Line **1**

Ex 2: `Metro 1||East Dir. 2`\
-> Line **2**

</details>

<details>
<summary>List of Line Name</summary>

| Line | Code | - | Line | Code |
|------|:------:|:-:|:------:|-------:
| Metro 1 | 1 | - | RER A | a |
| Metro 2 | 2 | - | RER B | b |
| Metro 3 | 3 | - | RER C | c |
| Metro 3 bis | 3b | - | RER D | d |
| Metro 4 | 4 | - | RER E | e |
| Metro 5 | 5 | - | -
| Metro 6 | 6 | - | Transilien H | h |
| Metro 7 | 7 | - | Transilien J | j |
| Metro 7 bis | 7b | - | Transilien K | k |
| Metro 8 | 8 | - | Transilien L | l |
| Metro 9 | 9|  - | Transilien N | n |
| Metro 10 | 10 | - | Transilien P | p |
| Metro 11 | 11 | - | Transilien R | r |
| Metro 12 | 12 | - | Transilien U | u |
| Metro 13 | 13 | - | Transilien V | v |
| Metro 14 | 14 | - |
| Metro 15 | 15 | - |
| Metro 16 | 16 | - |
| Metro 17 | 17 | - |
| Metro 18 | 18 | - |
</details>

### Advanced SNCF Pids use
Refer to the [original SNCF PIDS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sncf-pids) page.

## MORE INFORMATION

### Super Thank’s
HypernovaGBX, MarcusLion, Piaxo
